name: socialforge
description: Agency-grade social media calendar automation with asset-first compositing — image generation (Vertex AI Nano Banana Pro), video generation (WaveSpeed Kling v3.0 Pro), C2PA content provenance for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance, multi-brand multi-platform. 16 skills, 5 agents, 22 scripts, 10 HTTP MCP connectors. Zero global hooks. Shared model curator (scripts/model_registry.json + resolve_model.py): image / video / vision model ids resolved via aliases (latest-image-google, latest-image-edit-google, latest-vision-google, latest-video-wavespeed, latest-video-google); deprecated ids auto-fall-forward; --model and --video-model flags accept any registered id. See docs/MODEL-CURATOR.md.

interface.shortDescription: Agency-grade social media calendar automation — asset-first compositing, AI image/video generation, C2PA provenance, multi-brand.
interface.longDescription: SocialForge brings agency-grade social media production to OpenAI Codex via 16 portable Agent Skills. Parse a calendar (Google Sheets, Notion, Airtable), match brand assets, generate AI-composed creative (Vertex AI Nano Banana Pro for stills, WaveSpeed Kling v3.0 Pro for video), render multi-slide carousels, adapt copy per platform (Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Threads, X, Facebook), produce review galleries with human-in-the-loop approval at every creative stage. Skills are platform-portable (same SKILL.md frontmatter open standard used by Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot CLI). C2PA content provenance via scripts/c2pa_sign.py for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance (applicable 2 Aug 2026) — embeds machine-readable provenance manifests with brand + generator + prompt + platform metadata. 10 HTTP MCP connectors (Notion, Canva, Slack, Webflow, Figma, etc.) connect only when env vars are configured — zero global hooks.
interface.defaultPrompt: Set up a new brand and run today's social media calendar.
